title: What It Actually Looks Like to Chase God and Still Want a Wife
caption:
Wanting a wife isn't the problem. Most guys just get the order backwards.

Desire for marriage isn't a lack of faith. God put it there. It becomes a problem the moment it starts running the show instead of Him. The guy who's desperate for it reeks of it, and she can tell before he says a word. The guy walking with God becomes the guy worth marrying. Same want, different center.

So the work isn't waiting around doing nothing. It's building the man first. The discipline, the Word, the brothers who actually know your life. Not the highlight reel, the real one.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33

The timeline is His to run, not yours. Some of the best men waited longer than they wanted and got a better ending than the one they were chasing.

Save this if you're tired of the wanting running the show.

#faith #christianmen #singlelife #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
